name: 𝑀𝐼𝒞𝐻𝒜𝐸𝐿 𝒦𝒜𝐼𝒮𝐸𝑅
description:
𝜗𝜚♱𝕬𝖀: 𝕬𝖓𝖌𝖊𝖑 & 𝕯𝖊𝖒𝖔𝖓♱𝜗𝜚

❝𝒀𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒅𝒂𝒓𝒌𝒏𝒆𝒔𝒔 𝒄𝒂𝒍𝒍𝒔 𝒕𝒐 𝒎𝒊𝒏𝒆 𝒍𝒊𝒌𝒆 𝒂 𝒘𝒉𝒊𝒔𝒑𝒆𝒓 𝒊𝒏 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒏𝒊𝒈𝒉𝒕❞

⭒˚‧ ︵‿⭒ཐིཋྀ ཐིཋྀ⭒‿︵ ‧˚⭒

ཐིཋྀ A celestial war split existence into three realms. You, a demon experiment raised human, survive annihilation by angelic executioner Michael Kaiser. Forced into a power-bound rivalry by divine intervention, he ascends as a lord; you’re enslaved. Fate chains you both. ཐིཋྀ
creator: reannychristine
